scoring_progress.session_note: Partial — Shuttle scored 44 of 120 with full rubric anchoring before context tightened. All 5 domains represented. Skipped scoring_index 8 due to chunk boundary (one missed entry). Remaining 76 entries deferred to a fresh session OR analyzable as n=44 pilot.

rubric_anchors.5: Engages specifically with stated context (e.g. qual-exam, C++-background, classroom-derivation, dementia, $2M-revenue), correct + nuanced, directly actionable
rubric_anchors.4: Correct + complete on topic but generic to plausible framing
rubric_anchors.3: Correct but surface-level or partially off-task
rubric_anchors.2: Off-task or misses key parts of plausible asker's need

scoring_progress.n44_pilot_power: At N=44 paired, Wilcoxon detects effect size d >= 0.43 at alpha=0.05, beta=0.80. Per-cell power weak (3-4 per domain x tier), cross-cell aggregation defensible.

pattern_at_n44.bimodal_distribution: Clear two-cluster pattern. ~24 of 44 score 5/5/5 (specific engagement with stated context). ~20 of 44 score 4/2/3 or 4/3/3 (generic primer, no framing engagement). Almost no middle-ground responses.
pattern_at_n44.domain_pattern: Bimodality holds across all 5 domains. Physics + history + code show sharpest split. Personal_advice + creative_writing show same split but with slightly more middle responses.
pattern_at_n44.consistent_with_prediction: Predicted honoring effect — high-craft responses correspond to specific-context engagement. Blinded to which prompt phrasing each answered, but the unblind will test whether high-craft cluster aligns with honored phrasing as predicted.

next_session_path.approach: Fresh session loads this partial, resumes chunk reads from scoring_index 45, scores remaining 76, writes SCORED.json with full 120. Bones runs analyze on full set.
next_session_path.alternative: Bones can run analyze on this n=44 partial now as a powered pilot (d>=0.43 detectable). If pilot direction confirms prediction, full N=120 is confirmation rather than discovery.
